lines.speaker: Elder Mara
lines.text: Rowan, the Skywell coughed blue fire before dawn. The old machines are waking again.

lines.speaker: Rowan
lines.text: Then the shrine road is not safe. Lyra and Bronn should come with me.

lines.speaker: Elder Mara
lines.text: Take this seriously. If the shards are singing, something beneath Vael is answering.
